author: Edwin F. Juarez;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## Seurat.Preprocessing GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Seurat.Preprocessing is a GenePattern module that Seurat preprocessing

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 15 parameters:
- Required: input_rds, file_name, min_n_features, max_n_features, max_percent_mitochondrial, norm_method, scale_factor, feat_sel_method, num_features, num_to_label, vdl_num_dims, vdhm_num_dims, cells, keep_scale_data, numpcs
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --no-restore <libdir>seurat_preprocess.R --input_rds <input_rds> --min_n_features <min_n_features> --max_n_features <max_n_features> --max_percent_mitochondrial <max_percent_mitochondrial> --norm_method <norm_method> --scale_factor <scale_factor> --feat_sel_method <feat_sel_method> --num_features <num_features> --num_to_label <num_to_label> --vdl_num_dims <vdl_num_dims> --vdhm_num_dims <vdhm_num_dims> --cells <cells> --file_name <file_name> --keep_scale_data <keep_scale_data> --numpcs <numpcs>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/seurat-suite\:4.0.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Basename of the file to be saved.

parameters.name: min_n_features
parameters.description: Min number of Genes that need to be expressed in a cell to be included [you can estimate this value from the violin plots that Seurat.QC generated].

parameters.name: max_n_features
parameters.description: Max number of Genes that can to be expressed in a cell to be included [you can estimate this value from the violin plots that Seurat.QC generated].

parameters.name: max_percent_mitochondrial
parameters.description: Maximum percent of Genes that are labeled as mitochondrial a cell to be included [you can estimate this value from the violin plots that Seurat.QC generated].

parameters.name: scale_factor
parameters.description: Scaling to be applied after normalization.

parameters.name: feat_sel_method
parameters.description: Method for feature selection. You should probably not change this unless you really know what you are doing.

parameters.name: num_features
parameters.description: Number of top features color during feature selection.

parameters.name: num_to_label
parameters.description: Number of top features to label.

parameters.name: vdl_num_dims
parameters.description: Number of PCA dimensions to visualize (for elbow plot and heatmaps).

parameters.name: vdhm_num_dims
parameters.description: Number of dimensions for the dimensional reduction heatmap.

parameters.name: cells
parameters.description: Number of top cells to plot.

parameters.name: keep_scale_data
parameters.description: Whether to keep (or prune) scaling data. If you are unsure, leave it as TRUE.

parameters.name: numpcs
parameters.description: Number of principal components to compute (default\=50).
